title: atossa sepium
intro: Atossa sepium, also known as the Milk Thistle, is a biennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family, commonly found in the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Atossa sepium are attributed to its seeds, which contain silymarin, a complex mixture of flavonoids that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Atossa sepium include its ability to support liver health, protect against liver damage, and aid in detoxification. Atossa sepium is often prepared into herbal supplements, capsules, or tinctures, and can also be brewed into teas, making it a popular remedy for various liver-related issues.
